page.title: Conditional Alternatives And Nuance
page.subtitle_html: Conditional Alternatives And Nuance - C2 condition/result language with provided that, otherwise, but for, and formal inversion.
page.subtitle_text: C2 condition/result language with provided that, otherwise, but for, and formal inversion.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Conditional alternatives and nuance: concise C2 anchors for formal and nuanced condition/result structures.","rules":[{"label":"Condition markers","text":"Use provided that, assuming, supposing, and on condition that to state precise requirements.","example":"We will proceed provided that the terms are acceptable."},{"label":"Absent cause","text":"Use but for, were it not for, and had it not been for to show that one factor changes the whole result.","example":"But for the delay, the report would be ready."},{"label":"Formal inversion","text":"Use should + subject + base verb or were + subject + to + base verb for formal hypothetical conditions.","example":"Should you need assistance, contact the coordinator."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the English Sentence Builder C2 lesson on nuanced conditional alternatives.
